title: CAPM: Which of the following is NOT a characteristic of a...
summary: Apply the Capital Asset Pricing Model to calculate expected returns or evaluate security pricing.
prompt: Which of the following is NOT a characteristic of a well-diversified portfolio?

options.text: Calculated using weights and standard deviations
A well-diversified portfolio is defined by its ability to lower overall risk

solution: A well-diversified portfolio is defined by its ability to lower overall risk through exposure to various asset classes and securities. Concentration in a single asset increases risk and goes against the principle of diversification. Proper diversification spreads risk across multiple investments to mitigate the impact of any one asset's poor performance.
